_comment: Cameras the detector runs YOLO on. lat/lng/heading_deg/fov_deg MUST match src/data/mockCameras.ts. hls_url values come from src/data/realCameraStreams.ts. Detection depth is projected along detector/road_<id>.json when present. Currently only ITICM_BMAMI0080, which looks inland/east down ถนนสาทรใต้ at oncoming (westbound) traffic.
